title: v6.7 frontier: integrate governance audits into release sign-off
description: Integrate archmap-impact-audit, review-provenance-audit, and evidence-independence-audit into release-state-audit and fill empty command help inputs/outputs where still missing. Acceptance: release-state-audit fails when any v6.7 governance audit fails; command help benchmark remains green; unit tests pass. Stop condition: integration only; do not add new governance audit families in this task. QIF boundary: integrated audit pass is structural/runtime release-readiness evidence, not proof of semantic product quality.
triage_notes: Opened from v6.7 completion roadmap after TASK-074 evidence-independence-audit was implemented and verified. This is roadmap priority 4: make release-state-audit consume the three v6.7 governance audits.
